title: Generate grammar packages for remaining 11 languages
description: Generate grammar packages via tsgo-generate for: Go, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Bash, Rust, C, C++, Ruby, Perl. Each needs: 1) Run tsgo-generate on testdata/grammars/tree-sitter-<lang>/src/parser.c, 2) Wire external scanner factory if applicable, 3) Write integration tests. TypeScript has two sub-grammars (typescript, tsx). Perl grammar needs to be fetched first (add to grammars.json + run fetch-grammars).
